Package global.thalion.ttio.protocols

Interface Indexable<T>

Type Parameters:
T - element type
All Known Implementing Classes:
AcquisitionRun, GenomicRun
public interface Indexable<T>
Objects implementing Indexable support O(1) random access by integer index and, optionally, by key or range. This is the primary access protocol for collections of spectra, runs, and access units.

Key-based and range-based access are declared as default methods that throw UnsupportedOperationException; conformers override them if supported.

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOIndexable, Python ttio.protocols.Indexable.

  • Method Details

    • objectAtIndex

      T objectAtIndex(int index)
      Returns:
      the element at index (0-based).

    • count

      int count()
      Returns:
      the total number of elements.

    • objectForKey

      default T objectForKey(Object key)
      Optional. Override to support key-based access.

    • objectsInRange

      default List<T> objectsInRange(int start, int stop)
      Optional. Override to support range-based access.
